description: You are a forensic DNA analyst at a crime lab processing genomic sequence data for three CODIS (Combined DNA Index System) STR loci: D13S317, vWA, and TH01. Annotate the largest tandem repeat region (minimum 2bp, minimum 5 repeats) for each locus in the reference files (~/UGENE_Data/forensic/) as 'STR_core_repeat' within the 'forensic_markers' group. Determine the allele repeat counts for the evidence sample (evidence_sample_alleles.fasta) and save the annotated GenBank files to ~/UGENE_Data/forensic/results/ as D13S317_annotated.gb, vWA_annotated.gb, and TH01_annotated.gb. Create a summary report at ~/UGENE_Data/forensic/results/str_profile_report.txt containing the locus name, identified repeat motif, evidence sample repeat count, and annotation coordinates for each marker.

metadata.data_source: NCBI GenBank: D13S317 microsatellite (MH167239, 206bp), vWA/VWF gene (M25858.1, 5285bp), TH01/tyrosine hydroxylase (D00269, 2838bp) - real CODIS STR locus sequences
